current_summary: Startup de nanobiotech que desarrolla sistemas no virales de entrega genetica para terapias genicas y edicion, basados en nanoparticulas de oxidos metalicos.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a non-viral nanoparticle delivery library for gene therapies and gene-editing payloads.

current_one_liner: Affordable genomic cancer prognosis tests.
current_summary: Startup argentina que desarrolla tests genomicos accesibles para pronosticar agresividad del cancer desde la biopsia inicial usando IA y tecnologia PCR disponible en laboratorios locales. Entra en tesis por precision oncology y diagnostico molecular.
evidence_excerpt: GRIDX describes PreGen as an accessible genomic test that predicts prostate cancer aggressiveness from the initial biopsy using AI trained on more than 5,000 tumors.

current_one_liner: Engineered insect bioreactors for recombinant proteins and bioinputs.
current_summary: ByBug is a Chilean biotechnology company building an insect-based biomanufacturing platform using genetically modified black soldier fly larvae as living bioreactors. ByBug Synthetics transforms agro-food byproducts into recombinant proteins and bioinputs for pharmaceutical, veterinary, industrial-enzyme and agricultural markets. It is not grain traceability or producer infrastructure; it should cluster with biomanufacturing, recombinant proteins, engineered insects and circular biofactories.
evidence_excerpt: Official technology page says ByBug Synthetics uses black soldier fly larvae as bioreactors to transform organic waste into recombinant proteins and bioinputs through synthetic biology and genetic engineering.

current_one_liner: Thermogenic obesity therapeutics.
current_summary: Startup therapeutics que desarrolla candidatos contra obesidad y enfermedades metabolicas a partir de termogenicos diseñados in silico para degradacion lipidica.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes in-silico-designed thermogenic therapeutic candidates for obesity and related metabolic diseases.

current_one_liner: AI-driven biological product development platform.
current_summary: Elytron Biotech is an Argentine bioindustrial company transforming frontier technology into high-performance biological products for agriculture and bioindustry. Its AI-driven platform is designed to accelerate development, reduce industrialization risk and integrate market-ready innovations into bioindustry value chains, with team capabilities in genomics, gene editing, molecular biology, bioinformatics and agricultural pest problems. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as biological-product development infrastructure for ag and bioindustrial systems.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Elytron transforms cutting-edge technology into high-performance biological products through an AI-driven platform that accelerates development, minimizes industrialization risk and integrates into bioindustry value chains.

current_one_liner: Microbial biopigments for sustainable textile dyeing.
current_summary: Startup biotech argentina que produce biopigmentos con microorganismos para reemplazar tintes sinteticos y reducir agua, energia y quimicos toxicos en textil. Entra claramente por biomateriales/bioprocesos.
evidence_excerpt: Cancilleria describes Tintte as an Argentine biotech producing microbial biopigments for sustainable textile dyeing.

current_one_liner: BACTERCHAR soil-regeneration and carbon-storage amendment.
current_summary: Caligenia is an Argentine ag-biotech company developing BACTERCHAR, a soil-regeneration and carbon-storage amendment made by combining ancestral biochar-like soil practices with biotechnology and agriculturally relevant microorganisms. Its product transforms organic waste into a stable-carbon soil input that improves physical-chemical soil properties and microbial activity. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as carbon-negative biofertility, soil restoration and regenerative-agriculture infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Caligenia transforms organic waste into BACTERCHAR, combining ancestral soil amendment practices with biotechnology and microorganisms to improve soil properties, increase microbial activity and store stable carbon.

current_one_liner: Grain operations and ag-retail platform.
current_summary: AgTech argentina que digitaliza la ultima milla del negocio de granos para acopios, distribuidores y productores. Entra en tesis por precision agriculture and resource intelligence.
evidence_excerpt: Public startup profile describes an agtech platform that digitalizes grain origination, producer relationships and agribusiness transactions for acopios and distributors.

current_one_liner: Bismuth-sulfide nanoparticle radiosensitizer for oncology.
current_summary: NanoproX develops bismuth-sulfide nanoparticles that act as radiosensitizers to increase radiotherapy effectiveness and reduce adverse effects, especially for hard-to-access tumors. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as oncology nanomedicine and medical technology: a physical nanoparticle intervention coupled to cancer treatment, not an agricultural or generic materials case.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes bismuth sulfide nanoparticles that increase radiotherapy effectiveness and reduce adverse effects, especially in hard-to-access tumors.

current_one_liner: High-throughput discovery and aptamer platform for life sciences.
current_summary: Startup biotech que desarrolla una plataforma de alto throughput para sintesis de librerias combinatorias, screening y descubrimiento de aptameros aplicados a drug discovery, diagnostico y biosensores. Entra en tesis por computational biology and scientific software.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes high-throughput discovery using ultra-low-volume deposition, combinatorial library synthesis and applications across genomics, proteomics, diagnostics, biosensors and whole-cell assays.

current_one_liner: Genomics and bioinformatics platform.
current_summary: Empresa de genómica y bioinformática que ofrece análisis clínicos, paneles de genes, exoma/genoma y una plataforma propia para interpretación de datos. Entra en tesis por computational biology and scientific software.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes genomic analysis services and a proprietary bioinformatics platform for gene panels, exome and genome sequencing workflows.

current_one_liner: AI-driven microRNA therapeutics platform.
current_summary: Biotech terapéutica AI-first que identifica small molecules para reprogramar redes de microRNA en enfermedades complejas. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes an AI platform that identifies small molecules capable of reprogramming disease-specific microRNA networks for complex diseases.

current_one_liner: Fertility biotech built on reproductive biology.
current_summary: Biotech de fertilidad que desarrolla tecnologias para mejorar espermatozoides y aumentar la eficacia de tratamientos de infertilidad. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes sperm-enhancing technologies based on reproductive biology to improve infertility treatment success.

current_one_liner: Semantic search engine for life sciences.
current_summary: Plataforma de semantic search y analitica para investigacion en life sciences. Entra en tesis como software cientifico acoplado de forma directa a I+D biologica.
evidence_excerpt: Public profiles describe BioSeek as a specialized search engine and research environment for life sciences with semantic search and analytics.

current_one_liner: Engineered corneal tissue platform.
current_summary: Startup de tissue engineering que produce tejido corneal transplantable para restaurar la vision y reducir dependencia de tejido donado. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
evidence_excerpt: Official materials describe a project producing transplantable corneal tissue from cultured cells on a biocompatible membrane, with preclinical progress toward human trials.

current_one_liner: Synthetic oligonucleotide therapeutics company.
current_summary: Biotech terapéutica que desarrolla oligonucleótidos sintéticos para modular el sistema inmune y promover regeneración tisular. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes synthetic single-stranded oligonucleotide therapies that modulate the immune system and promote tissue regeneration, starting with Crohn's disease.

current_one_liner: Cell rejuvenation biotech.
current_summary: Biotech de medicina celular que usa IA y small molecules para rejuvenecer células y mejorar terapias como CAR-T sin edición genética. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes an AI-driven platform discovering small molecules to rejuvenate cells and enhance CAR-T and other cell therapies without gene editing.

current_one_liner: Big-data platform for agribusiness credit and socioenvironmental analysis.
current_summary: Brain.ag is a Brazilian agribusiness data and risk-intelligence company specializing in credit, financial operations, ESG and socioenvironmental analysis for rural production. Public acquisition coverage says its platform combines data, analytics and agricultural-risk workflows to originate, decide and monitor rural credit faster, including producer, collateral, area and compliance checks. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as ag-finance and socioenvironmental-risk infrastructure for biological production systems.
evidence_excerpt: Serasa Experian acquisition release describes Brain.ag as a big-data company for agribusiness financial operations, risk evaluation, producer monitoring and socioenvironmental analysis.

current_one_liner: AI and autonomous agriculture platform.
current_summary: Brazil-founded agtech and global AI/SaaS platform for agribusiness, managing real-time agricultural operations and supporting more efficient, lower-impact food production. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as enabling precision-agriculture and resource-efficiency infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official about page describes Solinftec as a global leader in AI and SaaS for agribusiness, founded in 2007, operating in Brazil and Latin America.

current_one_liner: Reusable-packaging circularity platform.
current_summary: CIRCCLO is an Argentine circular-economy startup building reusable-packaging systems for CPG brands, gastronomy and events. Its model combines reusable containers, QR/RFID/NFC-enabled tracking, circular commerce channels and real-time impact analytics so companies can replace single-use packaging with managed return loops. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as circular material-flow infrastructure and planetary-boundary stewardship, even though the mechanism is software-enabled operations rather than biotech.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes technology to eliminate single-use packaging, reusable systems for brands/cafes/events, QR/RFID/NFC-enabled containers, tracking and real-time circular impact metrics.

current_one_liner: Microbial discovery platform for high-performance agricultural biologicals.
current_summary: Symbiomics is a Brazilian ag-biologicals startup developing high-performance microbial products for plant nutrition, biostimulants, crop protection and carbon sequestration. Its official technology page describes proprietary large-scale microorganism isolation, genomic sequencing, data analysis, machine learning and gene-editing tools to discover robust strains and design new biologicals. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core microbial discovery and ag-biologicals infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official technology page describes proprietary microorganism discovery, sequencing, data analysis, machine learning and gene editing to develop a new class of biologicals.

current_one_liner: Ag biologicals CDMO and bioinput production platform.
current_summary: Brazilian agricultural biotechnology company and CDMO for bioinputs, spanning microbial prospecting, R&D, industrial fermentation and biological-input production. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a core ag biologicals and bioindustrial platform.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes IdeeLab as a CDMO for agricultural bioinputs, with microbial prospecting, P&D and industrial production infrastructure.

current_one_liner: Plant cell biotechnology ingredients platform.
current_summary: Empresa de plant cell biotechnology que desarrolla ingredientes de nueva generación, proteínas recombinantes y herramientas de breeding a partir de células vegetales. Entra en tesis por food biotech and novel ingredients.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes plant cell biotechnology for next-generation ingredients, recombinant proteins and crop innovation tools.

current_one_liner: 3D-printed microdevice platform for assisted reproduction.
current_summary: Gameet is an Argentine reproductive-biotech startup developing 3D-printed microdevices to optimize the production of healthy human embryos in assisted-reproduction workflows. Its technology sits at the intersection of medtech, embryology and reproductive biology: a physical microdevice designed to improve biological outcomes in fertility treatment. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as reproductive medtech and bioinstrumentation.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Gameet as a biotechnology startup optimizing healthy human embryo production through 3D-printed microdevices for assisted reproduction.

current_one_liner: Real-world asset and traceability infrastructure for agribusiness.
current_summary: Infraestructura para tokenizar granos y otros activos del agro, habilitando pagos, financiamiento, colateral y trazabilidad sobre activos materiales reales. Entra en tesis por acople fuerte a cadenas agro-materiales y capa de trazabilidad/sustentabilidad.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes digitization of grains into agrotokens and additional traceability and sustainability explorer tools for material supply chains.

current_one_liner: Oral vaccine platform for aquaculture.
current_summary: Startup de animal biotech que desarrolla vacunas orales para peces para reducir estres operativo y evitar antibioticos en acuicultura. Entra en tesis por ag biologicals and crop resilience.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes oral fish vaccines designed to simplify production, reduce animal stress and avoid antibiotics.

current_one_liner: Microbial fermentation platform for sustainable food ingredients.
current_summary: NanoInGreen is a food-biotech ingredient startup using microorganism strains and fermentation as natural biofactories to create sustainable, bioavailable ingredients for the food industry. Its public site describes a bioplatform of more than 150 microorganism strains, GMO-free and clean-label formulas, natural preservatives and absorbable mineral ingredients. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as microbial food-ingredient biomanufacturing and functional nutrition infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says NanoInGreen uses microorganisms to create sustainable bioavailable food ingredients, has a platform of 150+ strains and develops natural preservatives and absorbable minerals.

current_one_liner: Bone-targeted drug delivery startup.
current_summary: Startup de therapeutics que desarrolla nanomedicina biomimetica para llevar farmacos directamente al hueso. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes hydroxyapatite nanospheres that target bone and improve the delivery of drugs such as bisphosphonates for osteoporosis and other bone diseases.

current_one_liner: Cultivated meat production infrastructure.
current_summary: Startup food biotech que construye infraestructura de produccion para carne cultivada, con foco en escalado modular y manufactura on-demand. Entra en tesis por su acople directo a agricultura celular y transicion proteica.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says cell.farm is building modular, on-demand production infrastructure for cultivated meat to reach global scale.

current_one_liner: Bioengineered corneal tissue for vision restoration.
current_summary: Spin-off bioingenieril enfocada en producir tejido corneal funcional, biosintetico y trasplantable para restaurar vision y reducir costos de trasplante. Entra en tesis por ingenieria de tejidos y medicina regenerativa.
evidence_excerpt: Tecnologico de Monterrey describes Ocular Bio Design as a tissue engineering spin-off creating functional, biosynthetic and biocompatible corneal tissue to restore vision.

current_one_liner: Soil health and agricultural biologicals platform.
current_summary: Gênica is a Brazilian ag-biologicals company developing bioinputs and soil-health technologies for regenerative crop management. Its R&D spans bioprospection of new organisms and microbial groups, molecular techniques, bioinformatics and products based on organic molecules from microorganisms or other sources. The company emphasizes biological products that reduce chemical pesticide and nitrogen-fertilizer dependence, protect soil and groundwater, and regenerate productive systems. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core agricultural biologicals.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes bioinputs, bioprospection, molecular techniques and bioinformatics; its ESG page says bioinputs reduce chemical pesticides and fossil nitrogen fertilizers, preserve soil and groundwater, and support biological regeneration.

current_one_liner: Agribusiness loyalty, marketplace and producer-intelligence platform.
current_summary: Seedz is a Brazilian agtech platform for agribusiness loyalty, producer engagement, commercial intelligence, rewards, payments and credit access. Its relevance is infrastructural rather than biological: it organizes the commercial layer around farms, input channels and producer relationships in agricultural value chains. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as agri-market and producer-engagement infrastructure directly attached to material biological production.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes technology for agribusiness, including producer rewards, commercial intelligence, incentives, payments and credit access.

current_one_liner: Patient-centric oncology antibody discovery platform.
current_summary: Startup de anticuerpos terapeuticos que integra high-throughput biology y AI/ML para descubrir programas oncologicos con datos derivados de pacientes desde etapas tempranas.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a platform therapeutics company using high-throughput biology and AI/ML to discover oncology antibody programs with patient-derived data.

current_one_liner: Thermogenesis-based obesity therapeutics.
current_summary: Startup biotech clinica enfocada en obesidad y enfermedad metabolica, con candidatos terapeuticos que activan vias de termogenesis para tratar el balance energetico mas alla de los GLP-1.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Eolo Pharma as a clinical-stage biotech developing obesity and metabolic disease therapies based on thermogenesis and energy expenditure pathways.

current_one_liner: Unified API and data infrastructure for food and agriculture.
current_summary: Agriculture data-infrastructure company providing a unified API for food and agriculture, translating machine, field, imagery, weather and agronomic data into consistent formats. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as enabling infrastructure for agricultural data interoperability and planetary-boundary applications.
evidence_excerpt: Official website describes a unified API for food and agriculture that retrieves and manages farm data in consistent formats across machinery, imagery, weather and other sources.

current_one_liner: Biological control company for agriculture.
current_summary: Startup de control biologico que busca un nuevo modo de accion para manejo de plagas usando genetica y microorganismos. Entra en tesis por ag biologicals and crop resilience.
evidence_excerpt: Official site and public profiles describe a new frontier of biological control in agriculture using genetics and microorganisms.

current_one_liner: Microbial-metabolite nanodelivery platform for crop inputs.
current_summary: Qumir Nano is an Argentine bio-nanotechnology startup developing agricultural bio-nano inputs through precision nanodelivery of microbial metabolites. Its official site describes a cell-free technology that integrates bioactive microbial metabolites into nanostructured delivery systems for crop protection, plant health, nutrition, resilience and lower chemical-input reliance. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as ag biologicals / bio-nanoinputs, not human nanomedicine or food ingredients.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes bio-nanosolutions for agriculture, microbial-metabolite nanodelivery, crop protection, plant resilience and field trials in Argentina, Brazil and Paraguay.

current_one_liner: Agricultural drone spraying and crop-monitoring services.
current_summary: Precision Ag is a Brazilian precision-agriculture services company providing outsourced crop spraying and field operations with agricultural drones in Rio Grande do Sul. Its services cover liquid and solid pesticide/fertilizer application, seed and solid-fertilizer dispersion, pasture, reforestation, crop monitoring and plant diagnosis. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as edge-case resource-efficiency infrastructure for more precise input use and lower-impact crop management.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes drone-enabled agricultural spraying, solid and liquid input application, seed and fertilizer dispersion, monitoring and plant diagnosis for crop operations in Rio Grande do Sul.

current_one_liner: AI and bioinformatics for sustainable protein ingredients.
current_summary: Startup foodtech que usa IA, bioinformatica y microorganismos para descubrir y producir ingredientes proteicos naturales y sustentables, incluyendo proteinas dulces.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes AI, bioinformatics, experimental validation and microorganism-based production of novel plant-protein ingredients such as sweet proteins.

current_one_liner: Metabolic health functional ingredient platform.
current_summary: Startup de ingredientes funcionales que convierte compuestos de origen vegetal en cuidado metabolico cotidiano para control glucemico y resiliencia metabolica.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a plant-based ingredient for blood-sugar control and metabolic resilience designed for everyday use.

current_one_liner: Liquid-biopsy biomarker platform for early cancer detection.
current_summary: Epiliquid is an Argentine diagnostics startup developing an accessible liquid-biopsy platform for early cancer detection using blood-based biomarkers. Its public company profile positions the company around non-invasive biomarker detection, which makes it a clinical molecular-diagnostics case rather than general biotech. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as cancer screening and liquid-biopsy infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Company profile describes an accessible liquid biopsy biomarker detection platform for early cancer detection.

current_one_liner: AI copilot for retail waste and rotation management.
current_summary: Plataforma de IA para retail que detecta expiraciones, faltantes y ejecucion promocional para reducir mermas y mejorar rotacion en alimentos y consumo masivo. Se mantiene adentro como caso borde de eficiencia material y desperdicio.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes AI for expiry-based stock accuracy, task prioritization and promotion execution to reduce losses in retail operations.

current_one_liner: Biological fertilizers, inoculants and biostimulants company.
current_summary: Agrivalle is a Brazilian bioinputs company developing biological agricultural products, inoculants, biological control products, biofertilizers, biostimulants, adjuvants and regenerative-soil solutions across crops. Its official site and company pages describe more than two decades in agricultural biologicals, a broad portfolio and investments in bioreactor-based microbial production. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core ag biologicals and regenerative-agriculture inputs infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes bioinputs for activation, protection, soil revitalization and plant performance; company pages describe products biologicals, inoculants, nutrition and adjuvants.

current_one_liner: Computer-vision inspection and certification for agri commodities and food.
current_summary: Startup agtech que digitaliza inspeccion, testeo y certificacion de commodities agricolas y alimentos mediante computer vision y machine learning. Entra en tesis por precision agriculture and resource intelligence.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says ZoomAgri is transforming testing, inspection and certification of agri commodities and food via computer vision and machine learning.

current_one_liner: Bio-based colors for textile processes.
current_summary: Startup de biomateriales y quimica biobasada que desarrolla pigmentos bio-based trazables y validados para procesos textiles reales. Entra en tesis por biobased chemistry and advanced materials.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes traceable, certified bio-based pigments validated in textile applications that reduce reliance on hazardous chemistry.

current_one_liner: Personalized cancer vaccine and therapeutic platform.
current_summary: Startup de vacunas y terapias personalizadas que combina nanotechnology, AI y synthetic biology para entrenar celulas contra cancer y autoinmunidad.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a platform combining nanotechnology, AI and synthetic biology to create personalized vaccines and therapeutics for cancer and autoimmune diseases.

current_one_liner: Agfintech infrastructure for smallholder credit inclusion.
current_summary: IncluirTec is a Colombian agfintech-as-a-service platform enabling formal credit for small agricultural producers, rural microentrepreneurs and financial institutions. Its official site describes a digital bridge between producers and banks, microfinance institutions, NGOs and non-bank lenders, using alternative risk evaluation and 100% digital loan workflows. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as edge but defensible agricultural capital infrastructure tied to rural productive systems.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes IncluirTec as an agrofintech that transforms access to formal financing for small agricultural producers through digital workflows and alternative risk evaluation.

current_one_liner: Crop trait biotech based on plant photobiology.
current_summary: Agrobiotech que desarrolla tecnologias geneticas basadas en fotobiologia para mejorar fotosintesis, productividad y resiliencia de cultivos. Entra en tesis por ag biologicals and crop resilience.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes technologies to improve photosynthesis, yield and drought resilience in crops through advanced photobiology and biotechnology.

current_one_liner: Terapias neuroregenerativas basadas en exosomas.
current_summary: Startup de terapias regenerativas que desarrolla productos basados en exosomas derivados de celulas madre neurales para enfermedades neurodegenerativas. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes neural stem cell-derived exosomes to treat neurodegenerative diseases; CONICET coverage reinforces the science base.

current_one_liner: Non-thermal plasma seed-performance platform.
current_summary: Sylvarum is an Argentine agtech using non-thermal plasma and plant electro-hacking to improve seed quality, germination, vigor, pathogen control and yield without genetic modification or chemical residue. The technology is a physical-biological seed treatment that stimulates natural plant potential and reduces pesticide dependence. It should cluster with crop resilience, seed treatment, plant physiology and agricultural biologicals, not with climate monitoring.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes non-thermal plasma seed treatment, chemical-free dry processing, germination/vigor improvement, pathogen control and yield improvement.

current_one_liner: Digital agricultural finance and input-credit platform.
current_summary: Verqor is a Mexican agfintech providing formal, digital and productive financing for farmers and agricultural SMEs, especially for inputs, machinery and working capital. Its official site describes credit adapted to crop cycles, digital onboarding, input purchases and producer/supplier workflows; public impact material adds regenerative-practice adoption and access to biological agro-inputs. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as edge agricultural capital infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Verqor as digital financing for agricultural inputs and crop production, with impact on thousands of farmers and regenerative practices.

current_one_liner: Regenerative seaweed cultivation for marine restoration and coastal livelihoods.
current_summary: Startup chilena que desarrolla un modelo colaborativo de cultivo regenerativo de algas para restaurar ecosistemas marinos, capturar carbono y activar economias costeras circulares. Entra en tesis por su intervencion directa sobre sistemas vivos y regeneracion de limites planetarios.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes regenerative seaweed farming to restore marine ecosystems, capture carbon and create sustainable economic opportunities for coastal communities.

current_one_liner: CRISPR diagnostics company.
current_summary: Startup de diagnostico molecular que desarrolla tests rapidos basados en CRISPR a partir de proteinas Cas propietarias descubiertas en extremofilos. Entra en tesis por diagnostics and medtech.
evidence_excerpt: SOSV and public profiles describe next-generation CRISPR diagnostics built from proprietary Cas proteins and adapted to portable test formats.

current_one_liner: Targeted protein degradation therapeutics.
current_summary: Startup therapeutics que desarrolla degradadores de proteinas mediante small molecules para cancer y enfermedades raras, aprovechando el sistema natural de eliminacion proteica de la celula.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes small-molecule degraders and E3 ligase binders to eliminate disease-causing proteins in rare diseases and oncology.

current_one_liner: Crop trait biotech for resilient agriculture.
current_summary: Biotech agricola que desarrolla herramientas geneticas y traits editados para mejorar control de malezas y productividad de cultivos. Entra en tesis por ag biologicals and crop resilience.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes biotech tools for weed control and crop production, including genome-edited crop solutions and partnerships with seed companies.

current_one_liner: Infectious disease diagnostics company.
current_summary: Startup de diagnostics que desarrolla soluciones innovadoras para la deteccion simple y precisa de enfermedades infecciosas, con una plataforma que minimiza el uso de agentes riesgosos. Entra en tesis por diagnostics and medtech.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes innovative solutions for simple and precise detection of infectious diseases and highlights lower environmental and biological risk in production.

current_one_liner: Microalgae functional ingredients company.
current_summary: Startup biobasada que produce astaxantina natural a partir de microalgas para acuicultura, nutraceutica, alimentos funcionales y cosmetica. Entra en tesis por food biotech and novel ingredients.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes scalable natural astaxanthin production from microalgae for aquaculture and human and animal health-related markets.

current_one_liner: Agricultural credit and receivables infrastructure.
current_summary: Brazilian agrifintech providing credit, receivables and fund infrastructure for agricultural input distributors and the broader agro chain. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as enabling capital infrastructure directly tied to agricultural production systems.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes TerraMagna as providing credit for input distributors, receivables and Fiagro/FIDC structures serving agribusiness.

current_one_liner: Fertility diagnostics and reproductive age assessment.
current_summary: Startup de fertility diagnostics que combina evaluacion inflamatoria, edad reproductiva biologica y planes personalizados para acompanamiento de fertilidad y fallos de FIV.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes fertility support tools including reproductive age testing, inflammatory profiling and personalized interpretation for IVF-related decisions.

current_one_liner: Residue-to-energy and biochar platform.
current_summary: Climate-tech regenerativa que convierte residuos agrícolas húmedos en energía térmica limpia y biochar, devolviendo carbono al suelo. Entra en tesis por climate, energy and resource systems.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes carbon-negative systems that convert wet biomass into clean on-site energy and biochar, restoring soils while locking away carbon.

current_one_liner: Agricultural guarantees and credit-risk infrastructure.
current_summary: Brazilian agrifintech infrastructure platform digitizing agricultural guarantees, CPR registration, certificates, signatures and credit-risk workflows with AI, geospatial and field-analysis capabilities. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as capital infrastructure directly coupled to agricultural production.
evidence_excerpt: Official Sette site describes digital signatures, CPR registration, collateral/certificate workflows, crop classification and productivity models for agricultural finance.

current_one_liner: Programmable biology platform.
current_summary: TechBio que desarrolla biología programable para manufactura verde, biosensores de precisión y diseño de enzimas. Entra en tesis por biomanufacturing and bioindustrial platforms.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes programmable biology for green manufacturing, precision biosensors and the transition to a post-petroleum economy.

current_one_liner: AI-enabled agricultural credit and receivables infrastructure.
current_summary: Brazilian agrifintech connecting agribusiness and investors through AI-powered agricultural credit, risk analysis, receivables and traceability infrastructure. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as capital/finance infrastructure directly coupled to agricultural production systems.
evidence_excerpt: Official website describes Traive as connecting agribusiness and investors, using data and technology to transform agricultural credit into liquid qualified assets.

current_one_liner: Nature intelligence and biodiversity MRV platform.
current_summary: Lemu is a Chilean nature-intelligence startup building Atlas, a biodiversity and nature-MRV platform that measures and manages nature-related impact using ecological indicators, satellite imagery, AI and the Lemu Nge biodiversity satellite. It is not agri-market software; it should cluster with nature restoration, biodiversity measurement, planetary monitoring and ecological intelligence infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Atlas as nature intelligence combining ecological science, multi-modal sources and AI, powered by Lemu Nge, a biodiversity-focused satellite.

current_one_liner: Natural microparticles that make agrochemicals and biologicals more efficient.

evidence_excerpt: SOSV says Unibaio uses natural microparticles to enhance crop protectants and reduce chemical application doses by up to 80%.

current_one_liner: Bio-based biodegradable superabsorbent polymers.
current_summary: Startup uruguaya de biomateriales que desarrolla polimeros superabsorbentes bio-based y biodegradables para reemplazar materiales petroquimicos en higiene, agricultura y otras industrias. Entra por materiales biobasados y descarbonizacion industrial.
evidence_excerpt: LinkedIn describes POLYMERA as a deep-tech biomaterials platform replacing petrochemical polymers with high-performance bio-based materials, starting with bio-based superabsorbent polymers.

current_one_liner: Bioactive RNA extracts from fresh food.

current_one_liner: Plasma pyrolysis for clean hydrogen and conductive carbon.

It should cluster with biological pest control, crop resilience and agricultural bioinputs, not climate monitoring.
evidence_excerpt: Official institutional page describes Promip as a technology-based company with biological products for integrated pest management and a biofactory producing micro and macrobiological products.

current_one_liner: Advanced biomolecular alternatives to antibiotics.
current_summary: Argentine biotech initiative focused on advanced biomolecular alternatives to traditional antibiotics for human health and animal production. The project is backed by CITES and UOVO and aims to develop antimicrobial R&D capacity around biomolecules that can address infectious disease and antibiotic-resistance challenges. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as antimicrobial biotech spanning therapeutics, animal health and One Health applications.
evidence_excerpt: CITES describes Pepton as an initiative focused on R&D of advanced biomolecular solutions to provide alternatives to traditional antibiotics in health and animal production.

current_one_liner: Water-positive irrigation and watershed stewardship platform.
current_summary: Kilimo is a Latin American water-positive agriculture and climate platform connecting companies, farmers, NGOs and public-sector actors to improve irrigation efficiency and watershed security. Its work combines technology, agronomic practices and collective action projects so farmers optimize irrigation and stressed basins recover water availability. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as planetary-boundary water stewardship infrastructure for agriculture and ecosystem resilience.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Kilimo as working with companies, organizations and farmers to strengthen water security in stressed basins, improve irrigation efficiency and support water-positive projects across Latin America.

current_one_liner: AI-guided bacteriophage animal-health platform.
current_summary: Chilean animal-health biotechnology company developing tailored antibacterial solutions for poultry and livestock producers. Its platform combines AI-optimized sampling, bacterial diagnostics, virulence and antibiotic-resistance analysis, and machine-learning selection of bacteriophage combinations that target farm-specific pathogens. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a core phage-biotech and One Health company reducing antibiotic dependence in animal protein systems.
evidence_excerpt: PhageLab says it develops sustainable tailor-made solutions to control bacterial outbreaks using bacteriophages, AI-based sampling, bacterial analysis and optimal phage combinations on farms.

current_one_liner: Bacteriophage bioproducts for animal health and food safety.

Its SalmoFree and related phage products target Salmonella and other bacterial problems, helping reduce antibiotic use and improve production efficiency. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as phage-based animal-health biotech, food-safety infrastructure and antimicrobial-resistance mitigation for livestock systems.

evidence_excerpt: Official site describes precision agriculture, agronomic models, satellite imagery and traceability to make crop production more efficient, sustainable and economically viable.

current_one_liner: Controlled-environment vertical farming for fresh produce.

It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as resource-efficient food production and urban biological supply-chain infrastructure.

current_one_liner: Bacteriophage therapeutics and prevention platform.

evidence_excerpt: Official site describes bacteriophage-based solutions for infectious diseases in animal and human health, combining microbiological, genomic and bioinformatic tools.

current_one_liner: Anti-biofilm antimicrobial biotech platform.

Its SprAI system uses RGB cameras, onboard computing and solenoid valves to detect weeds in real time and apply herbicide only where needed, including soybean and corn crops. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as precision-ag infrastructure that can reduce agrochemical use, water use and environmental impact.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes SprAI as a computer-vision system that detects weeds in real time and controls spray nozzles to apply herbicide only where needed, achieving 70-90 percent agrochemical savings depending on weed pressure.

current_summary: CyanoMin is an Argentine environmental-biotech company developing biological desalination for hypersaline industrial brines from oil and gas, lithium and mining operations. Its platform uses unique extremophilic bacteria and electrically charged biofilms to adsorb and trap ions without membranes, pressure or heat, enabling brine treatment, water reuse and mineral recovery. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core bioremediation, water stewardship and resource-recovery biology.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes biological desalination for hypersaline brines using unique bacteria with thick electrically charged biofilms that adsorb ions and enable water reuse and mineral recovery.

It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as enabling infrastructure for gene therapy, vaccines, nanomedicine and biomanufacturing.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Amplify Dynamics develops membrane-free ultrasound ultrafiltration for LNP therapeutics, increasing recovery, reducing purification time and decreasing waste generation.

evidence_excerpt: Official about page describes IMEVE as health and biotechnology in animal nutrition, with modern laboratories for probiotic production and fermentation/lyophilization technology.

current_one_liner: Extremophile enzyme skin DNA repair ingredients.
current_summary: Uruguayan biotech developing cosmetic active ingredients from Antarctic extremophile enzymes that repair UV-induced DNA damage in skin cells. Its photolyase-based technology targets CPD and related DNA lesions, penetrates skin cells, reaches the nucleus and is validated through ex vivo and clinical studies. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as extremophile enzyme biotech, bioactive ingredient biomanufacturing and skin-health molecular repair.
evidence_excerpt: Antarka says its Antarctic enzyme repairs UV-induced DNA damage at the cellular level, shows nuclear ingress, 100 percent CPD DNA repair and clinical skin-firmness and elasticity improvements.

current_one_liner: Cell-free protein expression and synthetic-biology platform.
current_summary: Brazilian synthetic-biology company founded by University of S�o Paulo scientists to make protein engineering faster, accessible and customizable. Its Sol platform integrates gene synthesis, mRNA synthesis, recombinant protein expression, cell-free systems, cellular expression, genetic repositories, molecular display and optimized purification. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core synthetic-biology tooling and protein biomanufacturing infrastructure for health, agriculture, food, cosmetics and industrial biotech.
evidence_excerpt: BioLinker says its Sol platform designs, optimizes and produces recombinant proteins on demand using cell-free and cellular expression systems, genetic repositories, molecular display and optimized purification.

current_one_liner: Extremophile microbial seed treatments for crop resilience.
current_summary: Puna Bio develops microbial seed-treatment inoculants from extremophile microorganisms isolated from the Argentine Puna. Its R&D platform prospects extreme ecosystems, isolates and characterizes strains, maintains a culture collection and validates field performance to improve crop nutrition, stress tolerance, yield and soil regeneration. It is a core BIO VC LATAM ag-biologicals company.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes extremophile bacteria from the Argentine Puna used to develop seed-treatment microbial inoculants that enhance crop performance and regenerate soils, with a culture collection and field trials.

current_one_liner: Autologous tissue heart-valve reconstruction devices.
current_summary: AVaTAR MedTech is an Argentine/US cardiovascular medtech company developing a surgical method and device set for aortic and pulmonary valve reconstruction using the patient's own autologous tissue. Its AVaTAR approach standardizes semilunar valve reconstruction for children and adults, aiming to avoid lifelong anticoagulation, support pediatric growth and make procedures more reproducible. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as high-quality medical-device and tissue-based cardiovascular repair infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes AVaTAR as a surgical method and set of medical devices for reconstructing aortic or pulmonary valves in children and adults with autologous tissue.

current_one_liner: Targeted cancer immunotherapy platform.
current_summary: Biotech terapeutica con operaciones en Uruguay y Argentina que desarrolla inmunoterapia oncologica dirigida a TMEM176A/B. Entra por drug discovery e inmuno-oncologia.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Ardan Pharma as developing a first-in-class targeted immunotherapy based on small-molecule modulators of TMEM176A/B.

current_one_liner: Real-time wildfire detection using satellites, cameras and AI.
current_summary: Satellites on Fire develops early wildfire detection and smart monitoring systems that combine satellites, cameras, proprietary AI models and alert workflows. It is not bio-based, but it is directly biocentric: the product protects forests, land, biodiversity, carbon stocks and human settlements by detecting fires before public satellite systems can respond. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as planetary-boundary and ecosystem-resilience infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes early fire detection, smart monitoring and alerts using satellites, cameras and proprietary AI, helping detect fires before public satellite systems.

current_one_liner: Automated circulating tumor cell liquid-biopsy platform.
current_summary: Delee is a Mexican oncology diagnostics company developing CytoCatch, an automated platform for isolating and analyzing circulating tumor cells from blood. The technology is designed for reliable CTC capture, reproducibility and high recovery across cancer cell lines. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as precision-oncology liquid biopsy infrastructure for early detection, treatment monitoring and clinical decision support.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes CytoCatch as a fully automated platform for isolating and analyzing circulating tumor cells with high recovery and reproducibility from blood samples.

current_one_liner: Digital biobank for underrepresented patient populations.
current_summary: Omica is a digital biobank focused on underrepresented patient populations, integrating longitudinal clinical data, multiomics, imaging and biospecimen access. Its role is clinical data infrastructure for precision medicine, biomarker research and therapeutic development. It is not animal protein, agtech or food systems; it should cluster with clinical diagnostics, multiomics, biobank infrastructure and precision-health research.
evidence_excerpt: Official website describes a digital biobank with longitudinal clinical data, integrated multiomics and flexible access to data and samples.

current_one_liner: Microfluidic lab-on-a-chip platform for nanomedicine manufacturing.
current_summary: PLAMIC develops microfluidic lab-on-a-chip systems to design, manufacture and characterize nanoscale drug-delivery formulations for health applications. Public sources frame its problem as low reproducibility, reagent waste and difficult scale-up in conventional nanomedicine manufacturing. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as biomedical process infrastructure for nanomedicine, not as crop or ag-input technology.
evidence_excerpt: Argentina.gob.ar describes PLAMIC as a microfluidic platform for designing, manufacturing and characterizing lab-on-a-chip systems for health applications and nanomedicine production.

current_one_liner: Fermented sustainable bio-ingredients for the food industry.
current_summary: Done Properly is a Chilean food-biotech company creating sustainable bio-ingredients through fermentation and flavor science. Its portfolio includes MICO, a mycelium-based protein produced with advanced fermentation, and RAISE, a natural umami flavor modulator designed to improve taste while reducing sodium, sugar and additives. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as food fermentation, alternative protein and bioingredient infrastructure for healthier lower-impact foods.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Done Properly creates healthy, sustainable and tasty bio-ingredients through fermentation, including mycelium protein and a natural flavor modulator; MICO product page describes mycoprotein made with advanced fermentation.

current_one_liner: Precision fermentation and recombinant biomanufacturing company.
current_summary: Biomanufacturing company with deep expertise in precision fermentation, recombinant DNA technology and microbial cell factories. It produces animal-origin-free recombinant proteins, growth factors and cell-culture media supplements for biopharma, vaccines, cultured meat, regenerative medicine, food, health, nutrition and personal care. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core bioindustrial infrastructure enabling animal-free inputs and scalable precision-fermentation manufacturing.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Laurus Bio as an integrated biomanufacturing organization with precision fermentation and recombinant DNA technology producing animal-free recombinant proteins, growth factors and CDMO services across biopharma, food, health and nutrition.

current_one_liner: On-farm biological input production system.
current_summary: Brazilian ag biologicals platform enabling farmers to produce bioinputs on farm through integrated technology, equipment, quality control, training and technical assistance. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a core biological-input and crop-resilience company.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Solubio supplies technology, equipment, inputs, quality control and assistance for producers to produce bioinputs on farm.

current_one_liner: Advanced infusion systems and hospital medtech.
current_summary: Compañia medtech especializada en sistemas de infusion, bombas y soluciones clinicas integradas para hospitales y terapias criticas. Se mantiene adentro como medtech clinico, aunque no como biotech.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Arcomed as an innovation leader in infusion systems and integrated hospital solutions focused on safety and clinical workflow.

current_one_liner: Fresh food marketplace connecting producers and buyers.
current_summary: Brazilian fresh-food platform connecting producers directly with urban buyers, improving producer economics and reducing food waste. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as fresh biological supply-chain infrastructure and food-loss reduction.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Arado as a fairer and more efficient way to buy and sell fresh food, with producer benefits and food-waste reduction metrics.

current_one_liner: Natural microbiome-positive skincare.
current_summary: Uruguayan biotechnology-driven skincare company developing 100 percent natural personal-care products designed to support skin health and microbiome diversity without synthetic preservatives or chemicals. Its scientific process studies natural raw materials and their effects on the skin microbiome. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a biobased personal-care and microbiome-positive formulation company, though more peripheral than core therapeutics or industrial biotech.
evidence_excerpt: Cryosmetics says it develops 100 percent natural products that promote skin microbiome diversity and studies natural raw materials to identify those that best support microbial growth.

current_one_liner: Compostable PHB biopolymer from agro-industrial waste.
current_summary: INMET is an Argentine biomaterials company developing PHB biopolymer from agro-industrial byproducts through synthetic-biology strain optimization and a solvent-free downstream process. Its material is described as fully bio-based, compostable and biodegradable even in marine environments, with validated plastics applications. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core biobased chemistry, circular biomaterials and fossil-plastic substitution infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: INMET says it transforms agro-industrial waste into a 100 percent bio-based and compostable biopolymer through a solvent-free process; SF500 describes PHB biopolymer made with synthetic biology strain optimization.

current_one_liner: Genetic diagnostics and molecular analysis platform.
current_summary: Genotyping is a Brazilian genetic diagnostics and molecular-analysis company connected to BPI group capabilities across health, agriculture, sugarcane and food molecular analysis. Public company material describes high-level genetic diagnostics, next-generation sequencing and molecular biology services. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as genomics and molecular-diagnostics infrastructure, with a cross-domain footprint spanning human health and ag/food biology.
evidence_excerpt: Genotyping material describes a Brazilian company focused on high-level genetic diagnostics and NGS, and notes BPI molecular analysis work in agriculture, health, sugarcane and food.

current_one_liner: Engineered sustainable proteins without plants or animals.
current_summary: Mexico City food-biotechnology company designing and producing de novo nutritional proteins with computational biology, cell engineering and precision fermentation. Its engineered bacterial cells produce proteins in days without relying on plants or animals, targeting complete, sustainable and nutritionally optimized ingredients. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a core alternative-protein and synthetic-biology food company.
evidence_excerpt: F6S describes DProtein as designing de novo proteins with computational biology and cell engineering, using engineered bacterial cells and precision fermentation to produce sustainable proteins without plants or animals.

current_one_liner: Carbon-neutral organic dairy brand.
current_summary: Brazilian organic dairy brand produced by Guaraci Agropastoril and positioned as Brazil's first carbon-neutral organic fresh milk. Its model combines organic dairy production, animal-welfare certification and carbon-neutral claims through emissions accounting and native-tree planting compensation. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a regenerative/low-carbon animal-protein edge case, not as food biotech or novel ingredients.
evidence_excerpt: MilkPoint describes NoCarbon as Brazil's first carbon-neutral organic milk, with Carbon Free certification, animal-welfare certification and organic production.

current_one_liner: Digital agribusiness marketplace and agfintech ecosystem.
current_summary: Argentine agribusiness marketplace and digital ecosystem connecting producers, manufacturers, suppliers, agfintech and media across Latin America. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as enabling ag-market infrastructure rather than core biotechnology.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Agrofy as a digital-solutions ecosystem for agriculture in Latin America, with marketplace, news and payment/credit units.

current_one_liner: Plant-microbiome platform for soil restoration and crop resilience.
current_summary: Nunatak Biotech designs plant-microorganism associations to restore soils and improve crop performance in adverse environments. Its official evidence points to plant-microbiome symbiosis, soil regeneration and biological crop resilience, making it a core ag-biologicals company. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as microbial / plant-microbiome infrastructure for regenerative agriculture.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes plant-microbiome symbiosis design to restore soils and improve plant performance under adverse conditions.

current_one_liner: Large-scale regenerative agroforestry and carbon platform.
current_summary: Courageous Land is a Brazil-based regenerative agroforestry company scaling reforestation, conservation and climate-positive production through biodiverse tropical agroforestry systems. Its platform combines farm planning, financing, management, product sales and carbon measurement, with systems optimized for biodiversity, carbon removal, organic production, rural income and native species. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core planetary-boundary and regenerative land-use infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes large-scale reforestation and conservation through agroforestry, biodiversity/native species, carbon credits, agroforestry intelligence platform and regenerative soil/forest/watershed systems.

current_one_liner: Large-scale native biodiverse reforestation platform.
current_summary: Brazilian nature-based carbon removal company focused on large-scale native, biodiverse reforestation. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a high-priority biocentric and planetary-boundary company: it restores degraded land into native forests, removes atmospheric carbon and creates biodiversity habitat.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Mombak removes carbon through large-scale native, biodiverse reforestation, combining science, technology, forestry and carbon markets.

current_one_liner: AI-powered mesenchymal stem-cell therapy for bone regeneration.
current_summary: Mesenchyal-T is an Argentine healthtech developing AI-powered regenerative cell therapies for bone regeneration. Its advanced-therapy product combines allogeneic mesenchymal stem cells extracted from umbilical cord with hyaluronic acid and scalable ex vivo production, targeting bone injuries, degenerative disease and broader regenerative-medicine applications. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core cell therapy, stem-cell manufacturing and regenerative-medicine infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official website describes AI-powered cellular therapies for bone regeneration, allogeneic mesenchymal stem cells plus hyaluronic acid, umbilical-cord extraction and scalable ex vivo production.

current_one_liner: Hematopoietic stem-cell rejuvenation therapy platform.
current_summary: HeXemBio is a regenerative-medicine biotechnology company developing blood stem-cell rejuvenation therapies. Its lead program targets improved bone-marrow transplant outcomes in blood-cancer patients by restoring aged or exhausted hematopoietic stem cells before reinfusion; the company reports FDA Orphan Drug Designation and a completed Pre-IND meeting. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core regenerative therapeutics, stem-cell biology and cell-therapy infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official HexemBio article describes a blood stem-cell rejuvenation platform targeting bone marrow transplant outcomes, FDA Orphan Drug Designation and a planned IND pathway for human trials.

current_one_liner: High-throughput bioprocessing and Bio AI for biologics manufacturing.
current_summary: Stämm is an Argentine advanced-biomanufacturing company developing high-throughput bioprocessors, bioengineering services and Bio AI tools for biologics and cell-therapy production. Its platform supports cell-line development, biologics manufacturing, cell-therapy workflows and multi-omic data analysis, with continuous bioreactor technology aimed at increasing antibody productivity. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core biomanufacturing infrastructure for biologics, cell therapies and data-driven bioengineering.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a high-throughput bioprocessor, bioengineering solutions for cell-line development, Bio AI pipelines using multi-omics data, and workflows for biologics and cell therapies.

current_theme: bioactive products and regenerative edge cases
current_one_liner: Natural deep eutectic solvent systems for petrochemical replacement.
current_summary: Bioeutectics is an Argentine green-chemistry company developing Natural Deep Eutectic Systems that replace petrochemical solvents in industrial processes. Its platform combines bio-sourced compounds, AI-driven molecular-combination search, eutectic-system design and characterization to create safer, biodegradable and higher-performance solvent systems for cosmetics, food, pharma and industrial chemistry. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as biobased chemistry and solvent-substitution infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Bioeutectics designs Natural Deep Eutectic Systems that replace petrochemical solvents, improve industrial performance and use certified natural, biodegradable raw materials.

current_one_liner: Precision fermentation biosolutions platform.
current_summary: Empresa biotech integrada que usa precision fermentation y microorganismos para desarrollar enzimas industriales, bioactivos y alternativas proteicas mas sustentables.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a fully integrated biotech company using precision fermentation and microorganisms to produce enzymes, bioactives and alternative proteins.

current_one_liner: Quantitative MRI analytics for joint diagnostics.
current_summary: TensorCare is a Chilean medtech / AI diagnostics company adding quantitative cartilage morphology metrics to routine MRI. Its official site positions the platform as reproducible cartilage-imaging infrastructure for joint-performance decisions, orthobiologic treatment continuation, repair-versus-replacement decisions and PKR/TKR planning. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as clinical diagnostics and measurable-medicine infrastructure for musculoskeletal health.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes precision cartilage metrics from routine MRI, AI-assisted post-processing, reproducibility evidence and decision support for orthobiologic and joint-replacement decisions.

current_one_liner: Tropical forest restoration and carbon credit platform.
current_summary: Brazilian forest restoration company restoring tropical forests at scale using native species, spatial analysis, biodiversity co-benefits and high-quality carbon credits. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as ecosystem restoration and carbon removal infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site states re.green restores tropical forests at scale, aims to restore one million hectares and uses native/regional species, spatial analysis and monitoring.

current_one_liner: Nature-based carbon and forest conservation platform.
current_summary: Brazilian nature-based solutions and forest carbon company developing REDD+, conservation, carbon-credit and emissions services across Brazilian biomes. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as forest conservation and nature-finance infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Carbonext as a nature-based solutions company with REDD+ conservation projects, forest carbon credits, biodiversity protection and community benefits.

current_one_liner: Regenerative agriculture incentives and ecological outcome measurement.
current_summary: Ruuts is a regenerative-agriculture platform creating market incentives tied to measurable ecological outcomes such as soil carbon, biodiversity, water-cycle restoration and productive transition for rural producers. It is not food ingredients; it should cluster with nature restoration, carbon intelligence, regenerative land management and ecological outcome measurement.
evidence_excerpt: Ruuts official site describes regenerative land management that captures carbon, restores biodiversity and creates sustainable value for agricultural land.

current_one_liner: Large-scale ecological restoration business.
current_summary: Brazilian large-scale ecological restoration business restoring degraded ecosystems through native tree planting and generating carbon, biodiversity and community co-benefits. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as ecosystem restoration and nature-finance infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Biomas regenerates Brazilian ecosystems, restores degraded areas by planting native trees and generates benefits beyond carbon credits.

current_one_liner: Nature restoration and carbon-credit platform.
current_summary: Nideport is a nature-based solutions and carbon-credit company focused on ecosystem restoration, biodiversity conservation and carbon-credit generation. Public material describes restoration of natural capital through enrichment and native-species reforestation, plus a certified Misiones Jungle carbon project backed by Verra/VCS/CCB methodologies. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as planetary-boundary infrastructure for restoration, biodiversity and carbon markets.
evidence_excerpt: Nideport public project page describes a certified Misiones Jungle carbon-credit project, ecological restoration, biodiversity conservation and Verra/VCS/CCB-backed credits.

current_one_liner: Single-cell long-read sequencing kit and workflow.
current_summary: ArgenTAG is a life-science tools company building high-resolution single-cell long-read sequencing solutions. Its Single-Cell RNA Library Kit uses portable microfluidic cell partitioning, magnetic bead capture and smart barcoding so individual-cell transcriptomes can be sequenced on long-read platforms such as Oxford Nanopore and PacBio. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as genomics infrastructure for biomedical research, diagnostics, disease biology and cell-level discovery.
evidence_excerpt: Official product page describes a Single-Cell RNA Library Kit for long-read sequencing using portable microfluidic chips, magnetic beads and smart barcoding for ONT and PacBio-compatible workflows.
